member.summary: event send when the subsribed interval has passed

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow.on_new_transaction
member.summary: event sent when transaction new transaction has been created

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow.on_changed_transaction
member.summary: event send when transaction has been updated

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow.on_deleted_transaction
member.summary: event send when transaction has been deleted

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow._prepare_fpr
member.summary: Future Payment Remainder [FPR] – przypomnienie o zbliżającej się płatności

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow._prepare_dpr
member.summary: Due Payment Remainder [DPR] – przypomnienie o płatności (już wymagalnej)

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow._prepare_dfp
member.summary: Demand for Payment [DFR] – Wezwanie do zapłaty

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow._data_item_wrapper_.need_dfp(System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary:
is Demand For Payment needed?
wasn't sent yet AND was DPR at least iMinDPRDFRInterval ago OR payment is due over y-days

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow._data_item_wrapper_.when_fpr(System.Int32)
member.summary:
compute moment when Future Payment Remainder is needed Zero - was already sent
otherwise: -> after due-date

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow._data_item_wrapper_.when_dpr(System.Int32)
member.summary:
compute moment when Due Payment Remainder is needed Zero - was already sent
otherwise: -> after due-date

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.monitor_workflow._data_item_wrapper_.when_dfp(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary:
compute moment when Demand For Payment will be needed? Zero - was already sent
otherwise: if was DPR -> after given interval between DPR and DFR otherwise: -> after given interval after due date

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.tasks.scan_transactions(nxm.workflow.api.iworkflow_task_execution_context)
member.summary: task scanning transactions (used by watchdog workflow)

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.create_watchdog_workflow_data(nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_set_)
member.summary: create workflow data for creation of watchdog workflow defaults - 30 days back

member.name: M:nxm.money.workflow.paymebot.wf_id_customer_monitor(nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.iglobal_moniker)
member.summary: compose wf-id for paymebot-customer-monitor workflow for given customer
